mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (uid, email, nickname, user_name, user_tel, user_birth, create_date) VALUES (#{uid}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{userName}, #{userTel}, #{userBirth}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT user_num AS userNum, uid, email, nickname, user_name AS userName, user_tel AS userTel, user_birth AS userBirth, create_date AS createDate FROM users WHERE uid = #{uid}
